action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Bare, Palmeri, Anderson, Andraca, Arney, Billings, Brown, Clancy, Cruz, DeSanto, DeSmidt, Goodwin, Haywood, Hong, Hysell, J. Jacobson, Joers, Johnson, Kirsch, Madison, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Ortiz-Velez, Prado, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stroud, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor and Udell; 
cosponsored by Senators Roys, Dassler-Alfheim, Larson and Ratcliff
